SocialHub.title: Umkhakha Wezehlakalo Zentuthuko
SocialHub.subtitle: Phatha izixhumanisi zesocial media kanye nemipicha.
SocialHub.connect_meta_desc: Xhumanisa amapheji akho kanye nezihawu zomuntu osebenza ukuze ukwazi ukubhalisa ngokuqondile. Qiniseka ukuthi i-akhawunti yakho ye-Instagram esebenzayo ixhumene nelapa le-Facebook.
SocialHub.connect_tiktok_desc: Xhuma i-akhawunti yakho yeTikTok ukuze uhlele futhi uphakamisele amavidiyo ngqo.
SocialHub.beta_alert: Ukuxhumana ngqo ne-Instagram ne-TikTok kulhandela okwamanje futhi kumelindele ukulunga kwepulatifomu (Private Beta). Umthako uzophakamiswa kabanzi kunjalo kuye.

LandingPage.hero_description: Wonke umkhumbi udinga ikhompasi. Hhayi amathuluzi ahlukene. RiveHub ihlanganisa imisebenzi yakho, ikhusela imajini yakho, futhi ikhokhe icrew yakho phansi kokuhlela kwephasela lokusakaza.
LandingPage.hero_bg_alt: Ikitsheni elifikelayo lenziwe kahle nenkulumo esebenzisanayo
LandingPage.features_card1_desc: I-AI ihlaziya amalogi akho okushisa futhi iphakamise iminenduko yenkolelo yezengezo, okuyodwa emtimbi yakho.
LandingPage.features_card2_desc: Ukufunda ngokunengilo kwamabhuki abangani bakho basehhovela.
LandingPage.features_card3_desc: Isixhumaniso sihlela ngokungenasikelo kulimi lokwazi kwebhurigi yakho yekitsheni.
LandingPage.philosophy_bg_alt: Usiko olufindwayo lokwedu lokusebenzisa kwendlu yokuphakela
LandingPage.philosophy_intro: Ukuphatha iresturent namuhla kufana nokushayela umkhumbi ophakamiswe empilo — ngaphandle kwesingatsi, uqaphela.
LandingPage.philosophy_vision: RiveHub ikhompasi enguqula ukungathandi ube umuntu oziqonde.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_title: Elandela amakhono akho — kuzo zonke iziqalo
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_desc: RiveHub ayibuyiseli ukwazi kwakho — iyawuthanda ngodaba nokusasaza kuwo wonke umuntu wesizinhlelo ku-{count} izilimi. Akekho umthakalo emkhunjini.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_desc: Iphuzu ngalinye elilindekile lidatha likhona le kubhele. I-sonar ye-RiveHub iyakwenza ibonakale ngaphambi kokuthi wamukele amanzi.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar3_desc: Manje uma ucabanga kakhulu, ukuphi umkhumbi wakho wajwayela amanzi. Kusho ulwazi lwakho — hhayi lwethu.
LandingPage.hero_loss_hook: Usuku ngalunye ngaphandle kodatha ngu-isiganeko esinakakile.
LandingPage.calculator_subtitle: Linganisa intengo yokukhiqizwa kweqile ngaphandle kodatha ethembekile.
LandingPage.protocol_desc: I-IQ yekitsheni yakho ikhula ngokunambiqanga ngakuqala.
LandingPage.protocol_phase1_desc: Inkinobho eyodwa, futhi RiveHub iyaqala ukufunda umthetho wakho.
LandingPage.protocol_phase2_desc: Ukuthengwa kwakho okwedlulile kuba umuntu womchazi pangempela.
LandingPage.protocol_phase3_desc: Imizuzu engu-30 yenkumbiselelo nge-usuku futhi uhlelo lwakho lufike ku-92% ukunembisa.
LandingPage.features_card1_ai_suggestion: Hlola umuntu wokucindezelela nokuhambisa inyama ngokunesheshisa.
LandingPage.features_card3_target_text: Limpiar la zona fría de las neveras
LandingPage.nano_banana_subtitle: Thola izinto zethu ezine ezintsha zokuphathwa kwendawo zokudla ngokungenelela.
LandingPage.nb_haccp_desc: Wakhe amafomu akho okuphenya ngokunethula. Kalikhumi lokudla elingokungethekilile, esayiniwe ngomlando kanye nokungashintshwayo.
LandingPage.nb_sonar_desc: Idashabhodi yeChef. Landela ukuphenya, hlonza izithwali zakithini nokufunza ilitimela lakho ngokukhawuleza.
LandingPage.nb_ocr_desc: Unerekhodi? Thatha isithombe. I-Claude AI isikhwazi isindlela ukuthi ikhishe inani, umthwalo nomuntu. Hamba ngothile ongenzele umuntu.
LandingPage.nb_voice_desc: Tsela izakaniceka zakho zokuprepara nemiyalelo. I-Whisper V3 Turbo AI (iyashesha, isindimi esinlungu) isiguqula nokuhlukanisa omusebenzini wonke.
LandingPage.f1_desc: Kalibhuku elizingeni. Ukuthwala kwesitimela, iziphithiphithi zezishubisi, nezinkinga zabahambi zikhishwa nokukhangelwa yi-AI.
LandingPage.f1_ex1: Bhala iziphithiphithi zezishubisi (umzekelo, "Inqaba 2 ilikala, i-mechanic ibizwe").
LandingPage.f2_desc: Idayari yakho, ethwaliswe. Kusukela ezithwinthi zezikali kuze kufike ku-oyile yofreyiya, i-RiveHub ilandela ukulingana ngakunye futhi ibhekisa izinkinga ngaphambi kokuba zibe yizintshontsho zokupholisa.
LandingPage.f2_ex1: Inqaba ifika ku-8°C: ishiwo lokuqinisekisa "Hlengitheka noma lahlela ukudla okungaphansi kwerisiki".
LandingPage.f3_desc: Ayikho ibhukubheke yolwimi kusilizali. Ilungu ngalinye lesitimela linganikeza usesilizali nokuzinike izinike ekuseni ngesandla sakhe.
LandingPage.f3_ex1: Ugogo ubhala ngesiSpanish, owazimathe afunda ngesiBenga.
LandingPage.f3_ex2: Amakadi aoresiphi aziswa ngokunesheshisa abasebenzi abasha.
LandingPage.f3_ex3: Izindlela zokupholisa zitholiwe nokubukeka kwemunumzane yomuntu.
LandingPage.integrations_banner: Ixhumana ngokwemvelo nezinhlelo zakho ze-POS: Toast, Square, SumUp, Stripe, Lightspeed, Zettle...
LandingPage.f4_desc: I-Profit Radar yakho ixhumana ne-POS yakho ukuze ithathe ulwazi lwamaholo amathengiswe kanye nezikhulu zezindleko ze-cargo ngesikhathi sangempela.
LandingPage.f4_ex1: Ngokuzenzakalelayo, kungenisa amaholo akho avela ku-Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, noma Lightspeed.
LandingPage.f4_ex2: Thola izindawana "Izinkanyezi" vs "Izibumbu" ngisebenzisa i-Smart Performance Matrix.
LandingPage.f4_ex3: Uhlelo olunganelisani? I-AI ye-RiveHub ingena ngokwemvelo futhi inyakaze noma iyiphi i-CSV export.
LandingPage.f5_desc: Yeka ukulogisa i-manifest ngesandla. I-AI ikhipha izibonelelo, isilinganiso, nezindleko ezisuka kumabhoksi akho okuliverhe ukuze igrafu zakho ziphakamise.
LandingPage.f5_ex1: Thatha isithombe se-invoice yomthenguli ogxobileyo ekufikiwe.
LandingPage.f5_ex2: Ukukhipha okunohlaka kumugqa nomunye nomwe kanye nolwazi lokushintsha kwendlela ngezinhloko zokukha.
LandingPage.f5_ex3: I-Live nakamatiki ayodwa ayalezinto - ukulandelela izinto zefedi lakho.
LandingPage.f6_desc: Uthole izakhamuzi ezitsha ngezindlela ezikhusela umthetho ngezindawo zakho zesondela ezenza indlela eyodwa inake.
LandingPage.f6_ex1: Zenzela umthonyama onehle wokuphakamisela umenu weValentine's Day onezinkulumo ezekhiwe.
LandingPage.f6_ex2: Ngokuzenzekalelayo, guqula izindlela zakho ukuze uthore izakhamuzi zomhlaba.
LandingPage.f6_ex3: Zenzela incazelo ekhusela umthetho yezimo zakho zedelivery (UberEats, Deliveroo).
LandingPage.f7_desc: Qhelanisa lonke izikhwama zezakhamuzi avela ku-Libro, Resy, kanye ne-Zenchef. Ama-webhooks kanye nekhampini yokukhetha ngokwezinga lokweqa.
LandingPage.f7_ex1: Wamukele izikhwama ezintandundu ngokushesha ngaphandle kokuningiziwe ngesandla.
LandingPage.f7_ex2: Buthaniza izakhamuzi abeza, ukukhansela, kanye no-no-shows kumibono enye ephakathi.
LandingPage.f7_ex3: Qhelanisa ulwazi lwezakhamuzi ukuze uzuze umthwalo wakho wesevisi.
LandingPage.f8_desc: Inhlahlo ye-Sonar iqhelanisa izakhamuzi zakho abeza, amaholo athweswe, futhi ibalwe ngokuzenzekalelayo imikhakha.
LandingPage.f8_ex1: Bala isilinganiso sengxenye ngeyodwa yesindawo kuze kuthathwe izakhamuzi ezimumelekisiwe.
LandingPage.f8_ex2: Ungeza izinhloko ezisebenziswa ngaphandle kokumeleleka ingxubevange.
LandingPage.f8_ex3: Yisulela izindleko ze-cargo zonke ngaphandle nokuvula izivalo.
LandingPage.f6_mock_caption: Thola imenyu yekhethekile nayobusuku! I-bluefin tuna eningiliziwe kahle... ✨ Ukwazisa ku-bio 👇
LandingPage.tier_essential_desc: Umsika oqinile nokusebenza kwakho kujongwa ngosuku.
LandingPage.tier_performance_desc: Iziko Lakho Lokuthola Inzuzo Ukuze Ulandelele Izindlela Ezenzuzo Kakhulu.
LandingPage.tier_intelligence_desc: Okujulile Kokuqonda Inzuzo Nokuqagela Okulandelela Ifloti Ngokuzenzela.
LandingPage.f9_desc: Ukulandelela okuqinile kwezilwandle. Phatha amakegi e-yield, lundelela izikebishi ngahlukene, futhi qhuba umkhiqizo wepilisi ephelele.
LandingPage.f9_ex1: Ngokushesha khipha izatsheni nezikebishi ezigcina amasheni akho Okwangempela.
LandingPage.f9_ex2: Lundelela ukunyakaza okuqonde (umahluko) phakathi kwentengiso ye-POS kanye nobukhulu besikhosini sakho.
LandingPage.f9_ex3: Phatha izinyama zakho zebhiya kusukela ekukhuliseni kuya ekukha amakegi ngamaphuzu aningana.
LandingPage.f10_desc: Funda umyalelo wamaphepha akho. Ugesi nokusebenzisa kwamanzi kuvikwe ngenyanga uphumule amaflogo phambi kokuba ilebhili lifike.
LandingPage.f11_desc: Ukubuka okumile kwamanzi akho okwezimali nezindlela ezinzima zokukhulisa inzuzo yakho. I-RiveHub ihlobanisa idola ngalinye elingena nodiramu ngalunye oluphumelela.
LandingPage.f3_target_example: Limpia el suelo a fondo esta noche.

Pricing.title: Intengo ebonakalayo, umphumela wangempela.
Pricing.subtitle: Qala ngokukhululekile, nkumbule uma ulungile.
Pricing.tier_essential_desc: Umkhumbi owqinile noeco-system ukuze uhlele imisebenzi yakho yosuku nolunye.
Pricing.tier_performance_desc: I-Profit Radar yakho ukuze ubone izindlela ezinzuzo futhi izinzuzo.
Pricing.tier_enterprise_desc: Ukulawula iziteshi eziningi ngesithokozo esigcine okunye.
Pricing.tier_intelligence_desc: Izilwane zezinzuzo Ezijulile ezinokuqagela ukulawula ifliti ngokuzizisela.
Pricing.waste_calculator_subtitle: Kulinganisa ukunzuza ngokweqile ngaphandle kwedata ethembekile.
Pricing.enterprise_custom_desc: Idashbhodi ehlanganiswe, iziteshi eziningi, imithwalo yokwakhela ngokwezifiso, kanye nemfundo.
Pricing.nano_banana_subtitle: Thola amathuluzi ethu amane amasha okukwazi ukulawula iziteshi zokudla kalula.
Pricing.nb_haccp_desc: Zakha amafomu akho okuhlola ngesithambile. Ukuphepha kokudla okwakhiwe ngokwezifiso, osayiniwe ngokwedijithali futhi akholeleki.
Pricing.nb_sonar_desc: Idashboard ye-Chef. Landelela ukuhlolwa, thola izingibe zekitishini futhi uhlokoniphe iziqalo zomqulu wakho ngokushesha.
Pricing.nb_ocr_desc: Une-invoice? Thatha isithombe. I-Claude AI ingaphakamisi ngokushesha inombulunga, intengo, nama-ingiliziyenti. Sawubona ukungena kwedatha ngesandla.
Pricing.nb_voice_desc: Khuluma izindlela zakho zokuphakamela izindlela. I-Whisper V3 Turbo AI (esheshayo kakhulu, wezilwane ezimbili) iyathandi futhi iyahlela ikhosi yonke.
Pricing.features_title: Yonke izithuluzi ozidingayo ukuze uzulazule, endaweni eyodwa.
Pricing.f1_desc: Kaliyalibali amabhuku athwesile. Ukusebenzisana kwesigodo, izinkinga zezixhobo, nezimo ze-crew zilojiwe, zimapwe, futhi zinjanyelwe nge-AI.
Pricing.f1_ex1: Loga umoya we-equipment (isib., "Fridge 2 ileakela, i-mechanic ibizwe").
Pricing.f1_ex2: Hambisa imithetho ekahle yokunavigeyitha kumqulu wakuseni.
Pricing.f1_ex3: Landelela izinsuku zabantu abamile (ongubani wamakhasimende) ukuze uguqule indlela.
Pricing.f2_desc: I-logbook yakho, ezenzekilwe. Kusukela kumakhanikela afrijida kuya kumoile we-fryer, i-RiveHub ilandelela konke futhi ifaka izazulazuli ngaphambi kokuba zibe izwi lokufana.
Pricing.f2_ex1: Fridge ibamba i-8°C: isindebele sokwehlisa umsebenzi "Ehlukanisa noma yisithole isindhluluze-risk food".
Pricing.f2_ex3: Izinqubo ze-HACCP ezakho ezabhaliwe uma kufika isikhwele.
Pricing.f3_desc: Isikhwele salimi asikho-kwanele. Ilungu ngalinye linganikeza i-app kanye nezinothi ngolwimi lwabo olwenyama.
Pricing.f3_ex1: I-chef ilibhala ngo-Spanish, umsebenzi we-dishwasher ufunda nge-Bengali.
Pricing.f3_ex2: Amakhadi e-recipe aqonda kubi abantu abasha.
Pricing.f3_ex3: Izinqubo zokuphepha zazuzwa ngokunxa, ingakho ngabe ngabe abakhashi.
Pricing.f4_desc: I-Profit Radar yakho inxulumanisa ne-POS yakho ukuze iphethe ukushayela kwevolumu kuvukelweni. Khukhulisa umondi wakho ngokuzenzakalelayo.
Pricing.f4_ex1: Ngokuzenzakalelayo kethulela izintengo zakho kuvela ku-Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, noma Lightspeed.
Pricing.f4_ex2: Thola "Stars" nokuthinta ama-dishes e-smart Performance Matrix.
Pricing.f4_ex3: Isikhwele esibulungiswaniswa? I-RiveHub ye-AI ingokwemvelo iyahlela futhi iyakwethula iCSV export.
Pricing.f5_desc: Misa ukungena kwe-invoices ngesandla. I-AI ikhiphza izin-line items, imikhiqizo, kanye nokubalwa ngakho konke ukubuyekeza amanani akho.
Pricing.f5_ex1: Thatha isithombe se-invoice esemgxubweni somhlinzeki lapho kufinyelwa.
Pricing.f5_ex2: Ikhipha luhlu luzulazula kanye nezinothi zokushintsha amandla ama-ingiliziyenti.
Pricing.f5_ex3: I-live kanye ne-automatic update yemigungqo yakho ye-Food Cost.
Pricing.f6_desc: Agwaza abasazi abasha ngezindlela zokukhuluma zamakhasimende akho akhiqizwe ekilikeni.
Pricing.f6_ex1: Khiqiza izihloko ezithandekayo zemenyu yeSikhosikali sombuso emojis ekahle.
Pricing.f6_ex2: Ngokuzenzakalelayo guqula izindlela zakho ukuze uveze abasazi bezizwe.
Pricing.f6_ex3: Lokha isincazelo esithandekayo senethiwekhi yakho yamaningi (UberEats, Deliveroo).
Pricing.f7_desc: Qopha yonke imiphakeli yakho kuvela ku-Libro, Resy, kanye ne-Zenchef. Ama-Webhooks kanye ne-automatic polling ngokubuyekeza okucacile.
Pricing.f7_ex1: Mkezele imiphilo ye-online ngeshesha ngaphandle kokunikeza ngesandla.
Pricing.f7_ex2: Qopha abantu abakhokelayo, ukusuluza, kanye nokukhanyela ngabakwasikhosikali endaweni enye.
Pricing.f7_ex3: Ungubani umuntu womuntu ukuze ukwazi isiqalo sakho sokuningi.
Pricing.f8_desc: I-Sonar Analysis ixhumanisa abantu abafinyelayo, amaketango ashayela, futhi imalephu ukuze ingakhiqize umkoro wokuphakamela ngokuzenzakalelayo.
Pricing.f8_ex1: Bala isilinganiso sohla ngohla ngokusesha okuthi kusukela kubadlali abakuqinisekile.
Pricing.f8_ex2: Qopha izingiliziyenti ngempela ozidingayo ukuze uhlale kwizilalasi.
Pricing.f8_ex3: Kaluku umlandela wothupo ngaphambi nokwambuza indlela.
Pricing.f9_desc: Ukulandelela okushesha kwamajazi. Lawula imikhiqizo ye-keg, landelela amagalasi abanini ngesisigamu, futhi sebenzelusha i-kanban yomkhiqizo we-micro-brewery.
Pricing.f9_ex1: Hlukanisa ngokushesha izinkokhelo zebotile nenkosikazi kusukela ekuseni kwakho kwakho kweFood Cost.
Pricing.f9_ex2: Landela imikhiphane ethile (ukushintshwa) phakathi kokulandelwa kwePOS nokubala okunqunywe komthwalo wakho.
Pricing.f9_ex3: Phathela imisele yebhiya yakho kusukela ekuqobuleni kuze kube kukunqweba nge-yields ethile.

CGU.title: Imigomo Yomsebenzisi — RiveHub
CGU.s1_p1: RiveHub iyindawo ye-software-as-a-service (SaaS) eyenziwe uksiza abakhokheli berestuware, abaphahlela, kanye nabamuntu abasebenzisanayo ngesistimu yokuphakela ngosuku ngolunye ngamathuluzi akusetshenziselwa ubuhlakani bukamazinyo (AI) kanye nokwaziwa okuzuzela ngedatha. Inkonzo yayilungiselelwa ku-**rivehub.com**.
CGU.s1_p2: Indawo ibonisa, phakathi kwesinye, izici ezilandelayo:
CGU.s1_l1: **Incwadi yomsebenzisi edijithali** — Ukurekhodwa kwezaziso zesevisi ekusetshenziselwa ubuhlakani bukamazinyo (AI), ukuhlukaniswa okuzenzekayo, ukuhlonzwa kwokusheshisa, kanye nemibono yokunqoba ekushesayo
CGU.s1_l2: **Ukunikeza amandla okushisa** — Ukulalela, ukuhlaziya ususi, kanye nemibono yokunqoba okuthambekela kwahakcp
CGU.s1_l3: **Ukulawula imenyu** — Ukwakha imenyu, ukulungisa, kanye nokushicilela ngenziwa yokodiqa weQR nomsitho omncane womhlangano obonakalayo
CGU.s1_l4: **Ukuhlaziya inzuzo yokudla** — Ukubala umkhawulo ozenzekayo ngeso ngeso, ukulawula izingatho kanye nabamthengisi, ukulandelela intengo, kanye nezexwayiso zokuthola inzuzo
CGU.s1_l5: **Ubunjiniyela bemenyu** — Ukuhlukaniswa kwemenyu-matrix ye-BCG (Star, Anchor, Drift, Rock) nemibono yokuhoza eyenziwe ngu-AI
CGU.s1_l6: **Ukuguqula indingilizi kanye nebhilizela (OCR)** — Imodeli yombono we-AI-powered okunike ukuthutha idatha ezindingini kanye nedingilizi
CGU.s1_l7: **Isikhathi sekulungisa** — Ukwakha kuzenzekayo okusekela amamoli, idatha yomlandu womlando, kanye neresiphe
CGU.s1_l8: **Ukulawula amamoli** — Ukuhlangana nendawo eminingi kanye nokuchaza inqanaba lokuqukula kwavakashi
CGU.s1_l9: **Isikhungo semediya yasosayethi** — Ukwakha isizukulwane isixwayiso se-AI se-Instagram, Facebook, kanye ne-TikTok
CGU.s1_l10: **Ukulandelela umehluko kanye nokulahlekelwa** — Ukuqhathanisa okwenziwe nge-theory nalokho okwenzeke, ukubekwa kolathe, kanye nezenzo zokusizwa
CGU.s1_l11: **Ukukopesha kanye nokulandelela inzuzo** — Ukulalela inzuzo yosuku ezinyangeni kanye nokushintshana nebhangi
CGU.s1_l12: **Ibhodhi lokubala (Le Nid)** — Izikhali zezemali, ukunikezwa kwekufa, kanye nokubonwa okudaleka ngokuthutha
CGU.s1_l13: **Ukulandelela intengo yezisebenziso** — Ukubeka amandla nokugcinwa kwamanzi
CGU.s1_p3: RiveHub iyithuluzi lokunqoba. Ayikufakizi imibono eyothuleka, ulwazi lwenkosi, noma izibopho zomthetho womuntu osebenzisa noma kuhle.
CGU.s2_p1: Kulezi mizuzu, amagama alandelayo anemishwele efakiwe ngezansi:
CGU.s2_d1_def: Indawo ye-RiveHub eyayilungiselelwa ku-rivehub.com, kufaka izici zazo zonke, ama-APIs, kanye nezinhlelo ezishodiwe.
CGU.s2_d2_def: Naphi na umuntu wangempela noma esesisiqalo esase-legal owakhe i-akhawundi endaweni futhi wamukela lezi mizuzu.
CGU.s2_d3_def: Isigodi sesistimu yokuphakela esakhonyelwe umuntu osebenzisa ngaphakathi kweNkonzo, esisikhumbuzo sendawo yomsebenzisana.
CGU.s2_d4_def: Imodeli yolwimi (LLM) kanye namamodeli amboni atholakala othile (okukhethekile ku-Anthropic / Claude), ehlanganiswe eNkozini ekuhlaziyeni, umuntu osebenzisana, kanye ukulalela idatha.
CGU.s2_d5_def: Noma iyiphi inxwanyulo phakathi kweNkonzo kanye nendawo yokungena (uhlelo lwe-POS, indawo yamoli, inethiwoki yasosayethi) ngokusebenzisa ama-APIs noma ama-webhooks.
CGU.s2_d6_def: Ukuminya amacaracta — ubukhali bokubuyeka emibhalo neidatha kusukela esithombeni sendilizeni.
CGU.s2_d7_def: Lonke ulwazi olungenwe, olivulelwe, noma olukhiqizwe yumphumela ngaphakathi kweNkonzo, kufaka izaziso, imenyu, ama-recipe, izithombe, ukusikisa, kanye nomhlangano.
CGU.s2_d8_def: Inombolo eyikhombisa izinga lokugqoza kanye ukuwula-wula kwedatha yerestawarandi ngaphakathi kwendawo.
CGU.s3_s1_p1: Okufikelela eNkozini kudinga ukwakha i-akhawundi enekheli le-imeyili eliphakile. Umphumela uvuma ukunikeza ulwazi olulungile futhi ilungisele ibhindi.
CGU.s3_s2_p1: Umsebenzisi unobuwena ngqo okumele akulinganise izimfihlo zokungena. Noma yimaphi umsebenzi owenziwa ngaphansi kwesikweleti sikaUser kubhekwa njengokwenziwe nguUser. Uma kukhona isizathu sokucabanga ukuthi kunentuthuko yezinkinga, umsebenzisi kufanele azisize RiveHub nang nalokhu.
CGU.s3_s3_p1: Umningi we-akhawunti angakwaleka amalungu otimu ukuze bayosebenza indawo yomrestaurant. Imithetho eyafumaneka inyumba yile:
CGU.s3_s3_l1: **Umningi** — Ukufinyelela okugcwele, ukuphathwa kwesithaselo, ukwaleka nokususa amalungu
CGU.s3_s3_l2: **Umphathi** — Ukufinyelela kwemoduli yomsebenzi kanye nokuhlela kwerestaurant
CGU.s3_s3_l3: **Ilungu lotimu** — Ukufinyelela okufundwayo nokubhalwa ngokusekelwe kwimoduli ezimiselwe
CGU.s3_s3_p2: Umningi we-akhawunti unobuwena okuphathelene nemisebenzi eyenziwa amalungu otimu ngaphakathi kweService.
CGU.s3_s4_p1: Kunikezwa iucheku lwezinsuku ezingama-14 ekuthesiseni ngaphandle kwekadi leziphakamiso. Ngemva kwaleyo nkathi, kuyadingeka izithaselo ezikhokhiwe ukuze kuqhubekele nokusebenzisa izici ezimbalwa. Imininingwane ethethwe ngesikhathi sokuhlola igcinwa.
CGU.s4_p1: RiveHub ivumela ukoxhumanisa ngemisebenzi yangaphandle ukuze kuthuthuke ikhono layo. Umsebenzusi uyavuma ukuthi lokhu kuhlanganiswa kuncike kumesebenzi eqhutshwe yabathwala abazimele.
CGU.s4_s1_p1: Iservice isisekela ukusabalalisa okuhambisanayo nezinhlelo zePOS ezilandelayo:
CGU.s4_s1_p2: Imininingwane yotransakshini ekungeniswe ngalokhu kuhlanganiswa kusetshenziselwa uhlalutyo lwentengo yesisho, ubunjiniyela beninimenu, kanye nokubikezela okukulungiselela.
CGU.s4_s2_p2: Imininingwane yesiboniso isetshenziswa ekubikezeleni umthamo wabazali kanye nokukhiqiza uhlu lokufanela.
CGU.s4_s3_p1: Iservice iletha izinkundla ezilandelayo zokupapasheleza okukhiphayo:
CGU.s4_s3_p2: Umsebenzusi uvuma RiveHub ukupapashela okukhiphayo ngaphandle kwabo nangu emva kokuvuma ngokucacile kwesinyathelo nganye sokupiblisha.
CGU.s4_s4_p1: RiveHub ayizolinganiselwa ngezithekeli, izinguquko ze-API, ukungalungiswa kwemininingwane, noma ukuphucula okukuthintekayo kumesebenzi wethathu. Umsebenzusi unobuwena okugcina izincwadi zokuhlanganiswa ezisebenzayo kanye nokufakazela ukuvumelana kwedata esabalalisiwe.
CGU.s5_s1_p1: Iservice ihlanganisa thekinoloji yebuhlakani bokwethu (imodeli ye-LLM nebono) enikezwe yomniningi wethathu (Anthropic / Claude). Le thekinoloji iyasetshenziselwa:
CGU.s5_s1_l2: Ukuhlongoza izinyathelo zokuqondisela uma izinkinga zithathwa (amathemperetsha, umsebenzi)
CGU.s5_s1_l5: Okwenziwe okukhiphayo kanye nezihloko zomphakathi womedia
CGU.s5_s1_l7: Ukulungisa uhlu lokukulungiselela ngokusekelwe kwemininingwane yesikhathi nebikezelo
CGU.s5_s2_p1: **Izincomo, uhlalutyo, kanye nokukhiphayo okwenziwe yingenela yokwethu ehlanganisiwe ku-RiveHub kunikezwa ngenjongo yolwazi kanye nesinqumulo.** Umsebenzusi uyavuma nokwamukela ukuthi:
CGU.s5_s2_l1: Izincomo ze-AI **aziyona incwadi yokukhethuka** ekusunguleni ukuphepha kwisithwala, ukugcine umthetho, isithaselo, ubumpofu bomphakathi, noma induku esinye.
CGU.s5_s2_l2: Izincomo ze-AI **azizikhulusi** inkolo yochwane olunolwazi oluningiliziwe (umuntu onamathubu omphakathi, umbhali we-akhawunti oqinisekile, umphunga wokupheka).
CGU.s5_s2_l3: AI ingabe ikhiqize **imiphumela engalungile, engcukulu, noma engafanele** ngenxa yendlela yokuqonda kolimi.
CGU.s5_s2_l4: **Uxandulelwano lokugcina lwezinqumo zonke zokusebenza** — kukhona nokushintshanisa, izinqumo zezimali, ukushicilela okokuhlela, kanye nemithetho yokukhusela — **ihlala ngokundlela kwenyawo kuMtsheli kufela**.
CGU.s5_s2_l5: RiveHub **ayilingani noncwadi olunzulu lokuthintwa** kwendawo. Umsebenzi udumele *ukunikeza* usizo lomlawuli, hhayi ukunikela.
CGU.s5_s3_l1: **Cunga nokugcinisela** konke okucatshulwa yi-AI ngaphambi kokusebenzisa emasebenzi
CGU.s5_s3_l2: **Ungathembeli kuphela** ekucatshulweni kyi-AI ngemithi ethinta ukuphepha kokudla, ukuphepha kwabuntu, noma isithwali sezimali sendawo
CGU.s5_s3_l3: **Gcinela amakhono okulungiswa kanye nofundo** olungaziwa abasebenzi, akahembe nokusebenzisa umsebenzi
CGU.s5_s3_l4: **Tshela** noma iyiphi incazelo engalungile noma enonjenjeza umngcele rompilo kumaqela kaRiveHub ngolwandiso lwesokela
CGU.s5_s4_p1: Ukuhumusho kucatshulwa yi-AI kunikiwe ngokunqoba kuphela. RiveHub ayilingani ngokusondela, ukugcukulu, noma okunafanele kokuhumusho, ikakhulukazi ekuxhumaneni okudingidiwe okuphepha. Abasebenzisi bacelwa bave nokuqinisekiswa iziyalelo ezibalulekile umdumela esikhundleni esifanele.
CGU.s5_s5_p1: Idatha ekhutshuliwe ngokuzenzela kusukela ezikhathini (amabhiliyoni, izinvoice) ingaba nemiphunga. Umtsheli ubhekele ukuqinisekisa ukuningi, amalanga, amagama azenzeli, kanye neminye idatha ekhutshuliwe ngaphambi kokuyisa ekunikelaneni noma emsebenzini.
CGU.s5_s6_p1: Isikwele sezihlakelo yinto yesikhathi esibonisa ukugcukulu kwedatha engene kuUmsebenzi. Akuwona isikwele somsebenzi sangempela wendawo futhi akufanele kuthi sihunyuswe njengecarti noma ekumisweni kochwepheshe.
CGU.s5_s7_p1: Umsebenzi ubhala imisebenzi yokuzenzekelela ekhala, kukhona:
CGU.s5_s7_l4: Ukuthumela ibalisa lokugcina kanye nemyalelo yomsebenzi
CGU.s5_s7_p2: Lezisebenza ziyahamba ngamaphetha futhi zingathintwa ngokushiwo kweningi. Umtsheli akafanele ukuthembela kuphela kumiphumela yokuzenzekelela ngaphandle kokuqinisekiswa.
CGU.s5_s8_p1: Idifti yosasazo lwenqenqeko elwenziwe nge-AI (amagama, i-hashtag, ukufakela) iseluleko olungazicelela ukuqwashwa kwendlela ngaphambi kokushicilela. RiveHub iyisikhalo sayo konke okushicilelwe umtsheli kusosimu, noma oluqala nancishe omsebenzi.
CGU.s6_s1_p1: RiveHub ijobela kanye nokulungiselela idatha yomnuntu ngokuvumelana neCanada Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Act 25), kanye, lapho okusemthethweni, European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
CGU.s6_s2_p1: Umsebenzi ujobela nokuphakeleza izigaba ezilandelayo zedatha:
CGU.s6_s2_l1: **Idatha yekhukhula** — Igama, ikheli le-imeyili, inzalo yendawo
CGU.s6_s2_l2: **Idatha yomsebenzi** — Amanothi omsebenzi, umkhiqizo wenethempeleture, iyintlanzi, imibutho, izinto ezisetshenziswayo
CGU.s6_s2_l3: **Idatha yezimali** — Izindleko zezinto, amazamulela, izimali ezokuqala, umvuzo wosiku, i-digitize invoice
CGU.s6_s2_l4: **Idatha yokuzikhala** — Isilinganiselo sokudla, ibanga lesikhathi, amatimu okumwiswa (ashintshiswe kusuka eplathefomu ethile)
CGU.s6_s2_l5: **Idatha yeningi** — Izinto ezisusumiwe ngento, ingcambu yeningi (ishintshiswe kusuka kumihlanganiswano ye-POS)
CGU.s6_s2_l7: **Idatha yokulahleka** — Amarekodi wokwehluka, isikhafu, kanye nokwehluka kwesaphikheli
CGU.s6_s2_l8: **Okukhona kwezikhathakelo** — Izithombe zesitsha, amabhiliyoni kanye nezithombe ze-invoice
CGU.s6_s2_l9: **Idatha yokusetshenziswa** — Ukusebenzisana kuUmsebenzi, okulandelwa lulimi, log yokuxhuma
CGU.s6_s3_p1: Idatha yeMtsheli igcinwa ngangokunqunywa eSupabase kuma-cloud infrastructure (Amazon Web Services). Idatha ivimbilwe ngokwesikhathi nase-transit. Isenziwe enini-tenant ayisikela idatha ehlukaniswe phakathi kwendawo.
CGU.s6_s4_p1: Idatha ethile idluliselwa kuningi lenqobi zeAI (Anthropic) ngencubeko (ukuhlaziya kwesibonakalisi, OCR, ukukhiqizwa okuqondile). RiveHub iyibophele ekunciphiseni idatha yomnuntu edluliselwa futhi usebenzisa kuphela idatha edingidiwe njengokunguqula okucela. Lolunyawo lushiywa emithobo yezizimu zompilo zeningi ezixhumanisiwe.
CGU.s6_s5_p1: Idatha ebhekisiwe kusukela kumihlanganiswano ye-POS, iplathefomu yokuzikhala, kanye nesosimu iyadla ngamaAPI alazo amaningi. RiveHub inganakela kuphela idatha edingidiwe yokusebenza komodula okuthandekile futhi ingacimbi izilulekelo zokubuyisela zokugcina kwamakhasimane okuphepha aberestorante.
CGU.s6_s6_p1: Ngokuvumelana nomthetho ozithandile, Umtsheli unamalungelo alandelayo:
CGU.s6_s6_l2: **Ilungelo lokuhlehlela** — Lungiselela idatha engalungile noma engcukulu
CGU.s6_s6_l4: **Ilungelo lokusebenzisa** — Thola idatha ekufotheni okulandelwayo, okunganakiwe
CGU.s6_s6_l5: **Ilungelo lokuphikisana** — Phikisana nokucubungula kwedatha ngezinjongo ezithile
CGU.s6_s6_l6: **Ilungelo lokuyofuna imvume** — Yofuna imvume yokucubungula anumva
CGU.s6_s6_p2: Ukuze usebenzise lezi zilungelo, Umsebenzisi angaxhumana noRiveHub endaweni ecacisiwe esigabeni 13.
CGU.s6_s7_p1: Idatha yoMsebenzisi igcinwa ngesikhathi sesilinganiso esisebenzayo kanye nesikhathi sezinsuku ezingamashumi amathathu (30) ngemva kokuphusha, ukuvumela okukhuphuza kwedatha. Ngemva kwalelosikhathi, idatha isuswa ngokupela, ngaphandle uma kwenziwa umthetho okudinga ukuba igcinwe.
CGU.s6_s8_p1: Umsebenzisi ubamba inzalo ephelele kuyo yonke idatha enentengo, eflashwe, noma ekhiqwa ngaphakathi kweNkonzo. URiveHub awuzuzo olunye olunzalo bedatha yoMsebenzisi.
CGU.s7_s1_p1: Inkonzo yeRiveHub, okuhlanganisa amakhodi esource, idizayini, ama-algorithms, izincwadi, kanye nebhulandi, yovikelwe imilaw yewkuthula eCanada nasemhlabeni jikelele. Akukho okuthiwa kulemigomo ekuphi kanye okuvumela uMsebenzusi amangilizwe enalesi zinto, ngaphandle kokulungile kwokusetshenziswa ngaphakathi kwebanga lesilinganiso.
CGU.s7_s2_p1: Umsebenzisi ubamba amangilizwe wonke kunokukhiqwe kuNkonzo (amazwibelelwane, imenyu, amaresepi, izithombe, idatha yezimali). Umsebenzusi unikezela noRiveHub ngilizwe elikhawuliwe, elingaboshwa, elingatholiwe ukucubungula okukhiqwe kunalokhu kuphela ngelunga lokuhlinzeka ngeNkonzo.
CGU.s7_s3_p1: Okukhiqwe yi-AI ngenqumo yoMsebenzisi (amaposi emidiya-kuxhumana, izibuyekezo, izinguqulo, imialo) kuwakahle kaMsebenzusi ukunsebenzisa ngokutjhaja kungenako. URiveHub akuki ngilizwe lwewkuthula lase-intellectual kunokukhiqwe.
CGU.s8_s1_l1: **Mahhala** — Logbook, umhleli wemenyu, inguqulo yezilimi eziningi, indawo yomthombo wemidiya-kuxhumana
CGU.s8_s1_l2: **Essence** — Izici zamahhala + ukuhlaziywa kwentengo yokulya, indibaniso, ubunjiniyela bemenyu
CGU.s8_s1_l3: **Performance** — Izici zeEssence + uhlu lokukulungisa, izikhala-mfundo, ukubalulelwa kwelumonwane
CGU.s8_s1_l4: **Intelligence** — Izici zePerformance + ibhodi lokubala, i-AI ethuthuke, intengo yokusetshenziswa
CGU.s8_s1_l5: **Enterprise** — Izici zeIntelligence + ukuphahlana nendawo eziningi, inkxaso eyodwa, ukuthembela
CGU.s8_s1_p2: URiveHub ube nomlawuli wokutshintsha okuqukethwe kwamagatho esilinganiso. Noma iyuphi inguquko ekuthinta izici ezifakwe kwamagatho ayisilinganiso kuqala, izotshululiselwa ngemimpi yokubikela izinsuku ezingamashumi amathathu (30).
CGU.s8_s2_p1: Isilinganiso sikhokhelwa kenyanga noma iminyaka ekuthinteni koMsebenzusi, ngendlela yokukhokhela enokuvikelekela iStripe. Izilinganiso ziboniswa ezithishelweni zeCanada (CAD) ngaphandle uma kuthekiswa ngokwenye indlela. Inkathazo esebenzayo iyengeziwe kunani eliboniswe.
CGU.s8_s3_p1: Isilinganiso senyanga asitholiwe ukubuyela izimali ngesinye sesikhathi. Ukuze isilinganiso saminyaka, ubuyelo obungenantsingi obukhona bungacedwa phakathi kwezinsuku ezingamashumi anane (14) zokuvuselela. Ngemva kwalelosikhathi, akekho ibuyelo ezovikelekile.
CGU.s8_s4_p1: Umsebenzusi angashintsha amagatho esilinganiso kunumva kusuka kwizilungiselelo zeakhawunti. Ukuphakamisa kuthatha umthelela ngokushesha. Ukucibilika kuthatha umthelela ekuqaleni kwesikhathi sakukhokha okulandelayo, ngokuqhubeka nokuthola izici zamagatho aphakeme kuze kube nalelosikhathi.
CGU.s9_s1_p1: Inkonzo inikezelwa "njengokukubekwa" kanye "njengokukwakha." URiveHub akasiqinisekise ukuthi Inkonzo ibe ngaphandle kwephutha, kwalulwalele, okuvikelekile, noma okufanele ngenjongo othile.
CGU.s9_s2_p1: Kalalini lakho akekho URiveHub, abasikali bakhe, abasebenzi, noma abahlakani abazobamba inhlawulo ngenxa yalokho:
CGU.s9_s2_l1: Izikhwelelo zezimali ezisukela eidatha engazenzeka engenile i-AI noma eyakhiswa yi-OCR
CGU.s9_s2_l2: Izikhwele zeqhakamsela ezisukela ekuthinteni okwengeziwe kumialo weNkonzo
CGU.s9_s2_l3: Izikhwelelo zokuklwa noma zokusebenza ezihlobene nemialo ye-AI
CGU.s9_s2_l4: Iziphakamiso zenqubo yedatha ezisisimazane neqoqo letshini lesithathu (POS, izikhala-mfundo)
CGU.s9_s2_l5: Okukhiqwe nguMsebenzusi emidiyeni-kuxhumana, nakhona uma kukhiqwe nguNkonzo
CGU.s9_s2_l6: Ukupela kweNkonzo okusukela kuqoqo letshini lesithathu (umsimuzi, abahlinzeki be-AI, izinkonzo ezixhunyaniswe)
CGU.s9_s3_p1: Inhlawulo yetholakele yoRiveHub kuMsebenzusi ilinganiselwa kumikhwelo yesilinganiso okukhokhelwe ngokunene nguMsebenzusi ngesikhathi **kudluliswa kwesithupha-zeshumi (12)** ezidlulisayo isigaba esivame ukusiza ngazo ukulethwe idida.
CGU.s9_s4_p1: URiveHub akabambeki inhlawulo ngokweshayelo nakuphi kukhona okusukela ekuthinteni okwamandla ewempilo, okuhlanganisa ngaphandle kokukhawuliwe: imgibe yomhlaba, indlela yokufa yabantu abaningi, izulazulela, imithwalo yintshambalo ye-Internet, izikhwele zabahlakani abakuthintani, noma igijima legomane.
CGU.s10_s1_p1: Umsebenzusi angavalela isilinganiso sabo kunumva kusuka kwizilungiselelo zeakhawunti noma Ikhesithi lokhokho loStripe. Ukuvalela kuthatha umthelela ekupheleni kwesikhathi sakukhokha samanje.
CGU.s10_s2_p1: URiveHub ube nomlawuli wokumisa noma ukuphusha ukuningi kuMsebenzusi uma kunalokho kwamasiki alezi migomo, ukusebenzisa okungalungile kweNkonzo, ukungaphumeleli kakhulu, noma anumzane wanoma iluphi okusebenza okungenzeka ukwenzela inhlokhela ngeNkonzo noma abanye abasebenzusi. Umsebenzusi uzotshulululwe ngikhipu yangaphambili ukuphusha, ngaphandle kwamalungelo akawele.
CGU.s10_s3_p1: Lapho kuphela, umsebenzisi unesikhathi sama-**30 usuku** ukuthekelela idatha yakhe kusetshenziswa izinto zokuthola zeSevisi. Ngemva kwalesi sikhathi, idatha izosuswa ngokuvumelana nocwaningo 6.7. I-RiveHub iyazibophelela ekuhlinzekeni idatha ifomu elingenawo imali, elenziwe ngemisini (CSV, JSON).
CGU.s10_s4_p1: Lapho kuphela, lonke uxhumaniso lwenkulungwane ethile (iinhlelo ze-POS, isibonelo se-Toast, Square, Lightspeed, Resy, Zenchef, ukubhala okwehlile, ama-media anethweksi) anikwa imvume kangangamandla. Ama-thokheni emithetho ye-OAuth ayiyekeliwe. Umsebenzisi unobubhobho bokuthi uxhumaniso lucishwe kahle kusevisi sethulu lesithathu.
CGU.s11_p1: I-RiveHub inamagunya okwenziwa ngokubushelelezi i-Mithetho noma nini. Abasebenzisi bazobikwa mayelana nokuguqulwa okubalulekile kuposthi nanokukusho umuntu futhi e-app, elinekusikisela-ke **izinsuku eziyi-15** phambi kokuba imigomo emisha iqalise.
CGU.s11_p2: Ukuqhubekela phambili nokusebenzisa iSevisi ngemva kokuba imigomo emisha iqalise kuchaza ukwemukela imigomo eyenziwe.
CGU.s11_p3: Uma umsebenzusi engavumelani nokuguqulwa, abakwazi ukukhansela isilinganiso sabo ngokuhambisana nocwaningo 10 phambi kokuba imigomo emisha iqalise.
CGU.s12_p1: Lezi migomo ibuswe umthetho weProzinsi ye-Quebec kanye nemithetho yamadlela evuselelekile ye-Canada esebenza lapho.
CGU.s12_p2: Lanye iphikisano elivela emlotsheni nanoma kuyiphi okusebenzisa iSevisi kufanele linikwe inkosi yeningi yezikali zeProzinsi ye-Quebec, Isifundazwe se-Montreal.
CGU.s12_p3: Uma kuneziphikisano, abantu bayazibophelela ukuthola isixazululo esinothando esiqinile phambi kokuba bahlathule.
CGU.s13_p1: Uma unemibuzo mayelana nalemitengo, intoroktho yedatha yakho, nokusebenza kwiSevisi, sicela utintane nathi: **support@rivehub.com**

Meta.home_description: Indawo yokuphatha iresethorante enezingcwele e-AI: HACCP yokuvumelana, i-logbook enobulwazi, ukucubungula indlela yolwazi lokusebenza, i-OCR esakela amangeniso, ukuqumbuza imenyu, ukuxhumanisa kwe-POS, ukuhumana {count}-limi. Uhlobo olasimahla okutholakala.
Meta.pricing_title: Amahlinzeki namapulani — RiveHub Isofthiwe Yokuphumela Kweresethorante
Meta.pricing_description: Ama-RiveHub amasincemusiso kusukela ku-$59 ngenyanga. I-AI logbook, HACCP yokuvumelana, ukusumuza isisindo sokusebenza, ukuxhumanisa kwe-POS (Toast, Square, Lightspeed), ukuhumana {count}-limi. Inhlelo yasimahla, akudingeki ikhadi lekhredithi.
Meta.cgu_description: Imigomo yokusebenzisa i-RiveHub, indawo yokuphatha isofthiwe ye-AI resethorante. Umgomo we-AI, intoroktho yedatha, uxhumaniso lwenkulungwane ethile, kanye nemibono yethu yokvikela.
Meta.ai_page_description: Thola indlela i-AI yokuphumela kweresethorante eyenza ngokuzenzela ukusumuza indlela yolwazi lokusebenza, HACCP yokuvumelana, ubuninginingi bemenyu, nokusebenza yomhla wonke. Indawo yasimahla e-AI yeresethorante — akudingeki ikhadi lekhredithi.
Meta.login_description: Ngena ku-RiveHub dashboard yakho. Ukulawula isitolo okusheshwa yi-AI: ukuthobeka kwe-HACCP, ukulandelela izindleko zokudla, ukulungiselela imenyu, nokuningi.
Meta.signup_description: Dala i-RiveHub account yakho mahhala. Ukulawula isitolo okusheshwa yi-AI enezithobela ze-HACCP, ukuhlaziya izindleko zokudla, ukulungiselela imenyu, ukunxulanyelwa kwe-POS, nokusekelwa kwelimi elingu-{count}.
Meta.audit_description: Thola uhlolo lwamahhala olusheshwa yi-AI lokuthi isitolo sakho sivela kanjani online. Hlaziya i-Google Business Profile yakho, izibhalo, nendawo yenkampani imicabango emakhono emizuzwano.
Meta.menu_description: Hlola imenyu ye-{name}. Buka izidlo, izintengo, nokunobotama noma engenzela izibhekiselo.

AIPage.meta_description: Thola indlela i-AI yokuphumela kweresethorante eyenza ngokuzenzela ukusumuza indlela yolwazi lokusebenza, HACCP yokuvumelana, ubuninginingi bemenyu, nokusebenza yomhla wonke. Indawo yasimahla e-AI yeresethorante — akudingeki ikhadi lekhredithi.
AIPage.hero_description: I-RiveHub isebenzisa i-AI yokubushelelezi ukusumuza indlela yolwazi lokusebenza, HACCP yokuvumelana, ubuninginingi bemenyu, kanye nesinqumo sokuphatha — ukuze ungakonzela nokuxhumeka, hhayi isibali.
AIPage.what_description: I-AI yokuphumela kweresethorante ithathela imikhiqizo yenkonzo yemvelo nge-automation enobulwazi. Kusukela ekutheni isasela amangeniso kwanokukumbula imithwaloze ekulungisiwe, nangaphansi indlela i-AI eyenziwa impilo yumhla.
AIPage.f1_desc: I-AI ifunda imikhiqizo yesevisi, amakholamu okushisa, kanye nokubalwa kwabaqhubi ukuthola eloba nolwazi — ithathela amazlwane ngokubushelelezi enobulwazi elingatholakala.
AIPage.f2_desc: I-AI ikhombisa iphuzo lokuvumelana, ibiza izinto ezilungileyo, kanye nemibiko ekhonekele — ikhomba resethorante yakho ligcinwe kanye nokuze kulungiselele.
AIPage.f3_title: Ukusumuza Indlela Yolwazi Lokusebenza Ngaleso Sikhathi
AIPage.f3_desc: Sumuza indlela yezinto ezisebenziswa, thola izinto eziyingozi, kanye nokubalwa indlela ewumelele umhlobiso — kubalwa namandla. I-AI ikuqonde phambi kokuthi indlela ibuye ihoho.
AIPage.f4_desc: Thatha isifinyezo noma ufakele i-PDF. I-AI ithola izinto ngokukonkolo, umpilo, inani, kanye neningi — ithathela amahola edatha ekungeniseni enomzuzwane.
AIPage.f5_desc: Thola izinkosikazi zakho ezenzinzile ngohlelo lwe-BCG matrix. I-AI iphakamisa izilungiso zemenyu kulingana nolwazi lokusebenza, ukunkulunkulu, kanye nensimbi.
AIPage.f6_desc: I-AI ihumana imigomo yokusebenza, izincwajana, kanye nemenyu ye-multilingual — okunokunigiza ukuthi unina umlungu womuntu umuntu wengxangi iphuzu lakhe entweni.
AIPage.why_description: Amaresethorante asebenzisayo i-AI yokuphumela abikela ukuthela kancane, okulahleka kolwazi okuncane, kanye nokuvumelana okusiqinileyo. Nangaphansi okukushintsha lapho uyekela ukuquma uphakamele wazi.
AIPage.b1_desc: I-AI yenza ngokuzenzela isaseli yezilizali, ukubalwa kwalahleko yokuvumelana, kanye nezibalo zenindlela ezasebenza iminyaka eminingi. Iqembu lakho licishe likhale amakholamu futhi likhale ngebizo esimasiselwa.
AIPage.b2_desc: Ukusumuza okusheshayo kanye nokulahleka kwelahleko kusiza amaresethorante athola kanye nokususa izikhwele eshiyekile — njengenalelo lendawo kunombhalo wokuqala.
AIPage.b3_desc: Ukulandelela okungapheli kwe-HACCP kusho ukuthi awukho emkhakheni phambi kwesikhwebu. I-AI igcina amarekhodi akho okuvumelana kahle, anelisekile, futhi awenzeki kasikhwasi.
AIPage.how_title: Indlela i-RiveHub esebenzisayo i-AI enrestoranti yakho
AIPage.how_description: I-RiveHub ayisichibi sokusetshenziswa kwesisifundo esinephepha lika-AI. Isifiso ngasinye siklanyelwe ngendlela enestoranti ekhalikhali ezenzayo — kusukela ekhitjini kuya ekukhanyeni.
AIPage.step1_desc: Xhuma i-POS yakho (Toast, Square, Lightspeed, SumUp, Zettle), iphakamisele amafaketi, futhi u-invite ithimba lakho. Ukulungiswa kuthatha amanithi angaphansi kuka-15.
AIPage.step2_desc: Emashumiswini amabili nemane amahora, i-RiveHub's i-AI iyaqonda umklani wakho wezindleko, amaphethini omsebenzishi, nemikhuba yokuvumelana — futhi iqala ukuhlanganisa izikhanyezi.
AIPage.step3_desc: Izexwayiso zosuku lonke mayelana nokucekela kwesidlo, amarekhodi okuvumelana okwezenzululwazi, isikhwangiso senomboro yemukanzu, kanye nenombolo yokulungiswa kwethuluzi — konke ngaphandle kokusebenzel umuntu.
AIPage.step4_desc: Njengoba enrestoranti yakho ikhula, i-AI ikhula nawe — ilumela izindawo eziningi, amalungu ethimba elisha, nokwanda kwezikhumbulo ngaphandle kwenaledi yongeziwe.
AIPage.cta_description: Jinya restoranti eziweni zisonke ezisebenzisa i-RiveHub ukunika amasebenzi ngezenzukela, ukuncintsa izindleko, nokuvilikali ovumelana — kupowele i-artificial intelligence.
AIPage.cta_subtext: Ayidinga ikhadi lokubhalisa. Isikweletu samahhala, kunaphakade.

FAQ.title: Imibuzo ebuza kaningi
FAQ.subtitle: Konke okufanele uyazi ngaphambi kokuba uqale
FAQ.q1_q: I-RiveHub iyahumateka kanjani nesistimu yami ye-POS?
FAQ.q1_a: I-RiveHub ixhumeka ngokwemvelo nezindlela zokuthumela ezinkulu kufaka i-Toast, i-Square, i-SumUp, i-Lightspeed, kanye ne-Zettle. Ukusetha kuthatha umzuzwana omncane kunezemidlalo emihlanu — kumane ngokumvumela ukuxhumeka futhi idatha yakho iqala ukufakelana ngokuzenzakalelayo.
FAQ.q2_a: Yebo. Konke idatha iyafakwa ngesikhathi nokuphuma. Sisebenzisa i-Supabase yokusebenza ngomonakalo wesilinganiso, okuthetha ukuthi idatha yakho ihlukiswe futhi ingafinyelela kuphela eqempuni lakho. Asikaze sibahlukanise noma sithengise idatha yakho.
FAQ.q3_a: Izitolo eziningi ziyasebenza kahle ngaphakathi kwezikhathi ezilitshumi nanhlanu emizuzu. Xhuma i-POS yakho, webu iqembu lakho, futhi i-RiveHub iqala ukufunda iziganeko zakho ngokuzenzakalelayo. Uzothola izithako zensimu zokusebenza okokuqala ngaphakathi kwezinsuku ezimbili.
FAQ.q4_q: Kwenzeka ntoni ngemuva kohlelo lwakho olukhululekile?
FAQ.q4_a: Inhloso ye-Essence likhululekile akukho umkhawulo wesikhathi — isebenzise isikhathi esifunayo. Uma ukulungele izici ze-AI ezithuthukiswe njengo-oku-oda okubikile futhi izondelelo le-compliance, vuthulula i-Horizon noma i-Intelligence nanoma imuphi isikhathi.
FAQ.q5_q: Ingabe iqembu lam lingasebenzisa i-RiveHub entwaneni yazo?
FAQ.q5_a: Yebo. I-RiveHub esekelwe izilwimi {count} kanye nokukhuluma okuhlukahlukene — kusuka kwesiFrench kanye nesiNgisi kuya ku-Bengali, Kabyle kanye ne-Cantonese. Umsebenzi ngomsebenzi, ikhadi lombuzo kanye nokuqhubeka okvikeleke kuthuswazwa ngokuzenzakalelayo wemunye umuntu omsholi weqembu. Akukho umonakalo wolimi.
FAQ.q6_a: I-RiveHub yenzelwa ukuba yintombazane. Okubikelela okumuntu omncinane futhi okugxilile umsebenzi — iqembu lakho lingaqala ukulisebenzisa ngokushesha. Naphakathi nesikhathi, siphakela imihlahlandlela yokufika futhi iqembu lethu lomsizi liyatholakala nge-chat noma noma iyiphi imibuzo.
FAQ.q7_a: I-RiveHub isebenza njengo-logbook yakho otomatikhi. Izilingo zethemplethi yosuku, izinguquko zamamende, kanye namagagu eqembu ayabubula ngokuthi kumhla ngomhla kumamashidi okuzalwana okuthandeka ukuhlolwa ngaphandle kokusheshe okwengeziwe.

NauticalCommandCenter.title: Isitolo Sakho Yizinhlelo
NauticalCommandCenter.subtitle: Umkhokaphansi ngamnye udinga izinto ezinokusizwa. Hhayi amathuluzi akwahlukene.
NauticalCommandCenter.desc: Uhambela ngezimapa ezingaphelele. Abasebenzi behamba umthwalo wobheje. Abasebenzi bakho bakhuluma izilwimi ezahlukene. Abacwaningi benkampani bayafika ngaphandle komlindelelo.
NauticalCommandCenter.p1_desc: I-RiveHub ibuthanisa lokho okwaye kube amathuluzi amathathu ahlukene abe indawo eyodwa yokutolikoza — ngoba umkhokaphansi akasebenzisi i-sextant, i-barometer, kanye ne-compass ngahlukene.
NauticalCommandCenter.nav_subtitle: Izikhalazo ngaphambi kwesithunzi. Izinyathelo ngaphambi kokuvuza.
NauticalCommandCenter.nav_desc: Umholo wehla? Ukunikezela amakophi angu-47? Isexwayiso sethemperetshazi? Uyabona. Iqembu lakho libona. Ngolwimi lwabo.
NauticalCommandCenter.feed1_desc: Isenzo: Hlangula noma lahla ukudla okungcono ngokweqile
NauticalCommandCenter.score_subtitle: Kusuka ekubambeneni kwezindata kuya ekwalifikesheni yokuphakamisa.
NauticalCommandCenter.score_desc: Akudingeki ukuba iphelele ngosuku lokuqala. Wakha ingqondo ngokukhululeka.
NauticalCommandCenter.iq_desc_2: isigaba. Xhunyana i-POS yakho ukuze uvule ama-Predictive algorithms. Ingakho isikhathi esingu-30 sekunde sokubuyekezelana nsuku zonke zikukunisa ku-95% kunokuqonda.

ThreePillarsDemo.subtitle: Njengomkhumbi odinga isigxebo senkunzi sikunye (hhayi i-sextant, barometer, KANYE compass ngahlukene), udinga uxilindwane lwemibhalo eyodwa yokuchaza iMholo, Iqembu, kanye Nokugcina Umthetho.
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_prob: Abathengisi bakho bahambisele izintengo ngo-$0.50/kg. Uyakwazi ekuhambeni kwe-ikhava yomhlangano.
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_sol: I-OCR invoice scanner ithola ukutshaya komuntu ngokushesha. Esikhathini esizayo, uyakwazi ngo-5 amasekhondi.
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_b1: Tholakalisa abancingi bendlu ngaphambi kokuthi babulale inzuzo yakho
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_b2: Yazi inzuzo yakho yokuphakela ngempela ngesikhathi sokubheka (hhayi ukuqagela)
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_b3: Imibiko yokuwa kwemajini: "Isaladi ye-Salmon +$0.50/kg → Inzuzo ye-Tartare 28%→29.5%"
ThreePillarsDemo.owner_tip: Inzuzo yangempela. Isifiso sangempela. Imininingwane yangempela.
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_prob: Umhloli wakho wokusizwa ukhuluma iFulentshi. Umuntu ozisela izindilizindili ukhuluma iBhengali. Imiyalelo yempilo yokufa ilahlekelwana ekuhambeni.
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_sol: Yonke iresiphi, yonke indlela yokusebenza, yonke isaziso — kulimi labo lokuzalwa. Ngokukusindisane.
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_b1: {count} izilimi ezisekusiwe (IFulentshi, ISpanishi, IBhengali, ICantonese, njalonjalo)
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_b2: Amakhadi weresiphi awethulwa ngabantu abasha bonke, nangaphandle komthwalo womuso
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_b3: Wenqaba isikhathi sokuqeqesha ngama-40% (awukho umthwalo wolimi)
ThreePillarsDemo.chef_tip: Iresiphi eyodwa. Izilimi ezinhlanu. Ukucacisa ngokushesha.
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_prob: Amalogu e-HACCP asiqeshwe. Ukuhlolwa izinga lokushisa okuhlumukhisene. Umhloleli ufikile, wena ubaleka.
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_sol: Amalogu e-HACCP azibhala ngazo. Ukuvumelana kwenziwa ngokukusindisane kusuka ekusebenzeni kwensuku zonke.
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_b1: Ukulandelela izinga lokushisa → amalogu e-HACCP azibhalwe ngokukusindisane
ThreePillarsDemo.comp_demo: Ulolu lonke lwesilinganiso sokuhlobwa ngo-2 amaminithi
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_bad_end: Izinkokhela ezintathu, izingeniso ezintathu, izitoreji zemininingwane ezintathu
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_1: I-Margin Compass → Isichazelo Samakroo → Amacharti Okuvumelana
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_2: Ukungenisa okukodwa, idashbodi oyodwa, umthombo owodwa wenethezeka
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_3: Uqhakamshezo lwokusebenza nedatha kuhamba enlogbookini yokugcina ngokuzenzela
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_good_end: Inhlonipho yecrew + Ulawulo lwemali + Ukunakwa okunqoba. Ethebini olilodwa.
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_manifesto_start: RiveHub akuyona amathuluzi amathathu athwalwa ndawonye. Yilo
ThreePillarsDemo.adv_manifesto_end: lapho idatha yemali, ukuxhumana kwecrew, kanye nodokumentesheni yokugcina kuhamba ndawonye ngendlela engcono.
ThreePillarsDemo.cta_desc: Khetha indlela yakho. Qala kuScore yakho yamanje yeIntelligence. Wakha ngokulinganisela. RiveHub isikhula kanye nedata maturity yebhurazi lakho.

Audit.hero_title: Iyabonakala kakhulu yini indlela yakho yokudla?

Audit.error_network: Iphutha lonxantathu. Sicela uhlole ukuxhumeka kwakho.
Audit.cta_description: I-RiveHub ihlanganisa ukubonakala ngaphakathi nomzuzu ngedatha yakho yokusebenza — izindleko zokudla, ukunqoba ngokunembile, ukusukelwa kwesisukelo, ukunikezwa kwothimela — zibe yisikali esisodwa soKavika.

HACCPBuilder.empty_state_description: Sebenzisa iphaneli ngakwesokudla ukuze ungeze izilawuli zeshumi, umbhalo, noma izithombe.

HACCPAudit.disclaimer: Ngokuthumela, unisela ukunambika kwalesi sikhathi. Leli logu lizosindwa ngokushintshashintsha kwezinzuzo zecryptography.
